decisions.title: Performance concerns identified for Horizon Dashboard
decisions.detail: There are some concerns regarding the performance of the Horizon Dashboard project.

evidence.quote: there are some concerns about performance

decisions.title: Database improvement suggested for future
decisions.detail: A suggestion was made to potentially use a better database for the project at some future point.

evidence.quote: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.

decisions.title: UI aesthetic improvement required
decisions.detail: The user interface of the dashboard project needs aesthetic improvements to look nicer.

evidence.quote: The UI needs to look nicer.

decisions.title: Current UI design deemed unsatisfactory
decisions.detail: The team unanimously agreed that the current design of the UI is not great, indicating a need for redesign.

evidence.quote: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decisions.title: Project timelines remain undecided
decisions.detail: Despite a discussion about timelines, no firm decisions were made.

evidence.quote: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.

decisions.title: CRM system integration is a potential future requirement with open questions
decisions.detail: There is a possibility of needing to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but the timing and method of integration are currently unknown.

evidence.quote: We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but we're not sure when or how.

decisions.title: Budget identified as a concern
decisions.detail: The project budget was briefly mentioned and identified as a concern, though no specific numbers were shared.

evidence.quote: Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern but no numbers were shared.

decisions.title: Call for more thorough testing
decisions.detail: The team lead suggested that testing processes for the project should be more thorough.

evidence.quote: The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.

decisions.title: Improved documentation practice suggested
decisions.detail: There is a suggestion to improve documentation practices for the project going forward.

evidence.quote: We should probably document things better going forward.

implementation_scope: Analyze and resolve performance bottlenecks within the Horizon Dashboard project.
Implement a new UI design for the Horizon Dashboard to address aesthetic and usability deficiencies.

constraints.text: Horizon Dashboard must meet identified performance targets.
Project work must adhere to budget limitations.

open_technical_questions: What are the specific performance bottlenecks in the Horizon Dashboard (D001), and what technical solutions (e.g., code optimization, infrastructure scaling, or database change as suggested in D002) should be implemented to meet performance targets?

acceptance_criteria: Given the Horizon Dashboard UI, When a new design is applied, Then the visual presentation shall adhere to the approved design mockups and style guide.
Given the Horizon Dashboard, When the system is under load, Then its performance shall meet the defined non-functional requirements (NFRs).
test_scenarios: Verify that all user-facing screens in the Horizon Dashboard visually match the approved design mockups and style guide.
Verify the consistency of UI elements (fonts, colors, spacing, iconography, component states) across the entire Horizon Dashboard.
Perform visual regression testing to ensure no unintended aesthetic changes have been introduced after design updates.
Execute performance tests (e.g., load, stress, scalability) against the Horizon Dashboard to measure response times and resource utilization.
edge_cases: Verify UI aesthetic consistency and performance under various display resolutions and device types (if applicable to dashboard).
Test dashboard performance with a high volume of data to ensure rendering speed and responsiveness remain acceptable.
Verify the aesthetic presentation of the UI across different supported browsers and browser versions.
unresolved_behaviors: What are the specific performance metrics (e.g., response time, throughput, resource utilization) and target values that the Horizon Dashboard must achieve?
Where are the official design mockups and style guide documents that the UI aesthetic improvements must adhere to?
What is the definition of 'nicer' for the UI aesthetic improvement? Are there specific user experience goals or benchmarks to meet beyond visual conformity to mockups?

decision_history: The team unanimously agreed that the current UI design is unsatisfactory and requires redesign (D004).
Aesthetic improvements to the user interface of the Horizon Dashboard are a confirmed business requirement (D003).
dependencies: Potential future integration with the CRM system (inferred, needs confirmation for scope and timing) (D006).
risks: Performance concerns have been identified for the Horizon Dashboard project, which could impact user satisfaction and scalability (D001).
Project budget is a concern, though specific numbers and detailed implications are unknown (D007).
alignment_gaps: There is an inferred gap in current technical strategy or future architectural vision regarding the database, as a suggestion was made for future improvement (D002).
There appears to be an alignment gap regarding testing quality, as the team lead suggested more thorough testing, implying current processes may be insufficient (D008).
A suggestion for improved documentation practices indicates a potential gap in current documentation standards or adherence (D009).
open_questions: What are the confirmed project timelines and key delivery dates for the Horizon Dashboard? (D005)
Is CRM system integration a confirmed future requirement, and if so, what is the anticipated timeline, required functionality, and integration method? (D006)
Is the suggested database improvement a confirmed requirement for the project, and if so, what is its priority, scope, and target timeframe? (PM to confirm D002)
What specific improvements are required for testing processes, and what are the revised quality acceptance criteria for the project? (PM/QA to define D008)
What are the agreed-upon standards for improved documentation practices, and how will their implementation be tracked and enforced across the team? (PM to establish D009)

system_requirements: The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL achieve acceptable performance targets (inferred — needs confirmation of specific metrics).
The Horizon Dashboard system UI SHALL undergo aesthetic improvements to enhance its visual appeal.
The Horizon Dashboard system UI MUST replace its current unsatisfactory design with a new, improved design.
The Horizon Dashboard project processes SHALL incorporate more thorough testing practices (inferred — needs confirmation of scope and methodology).
The Horizon Dashboard project team SHALL adhere to improved documentation practices for the system (inferred — needs confirmation of scope and standards).
data_flows: Potential future data flow between the Horizon Dashboard system and an external CRM system (direction and specific data elements currently undefined).
interface_contracts: Potential future interface contract definition required for integration with the CRM system (details regarding endpoints, payloads, and protocols are TBD).

constraints.text: The Horizon Dashboard system MUST address the identified current performance concerns.
The project budget is a concern and will likely impose financial limitations on solution choices and scope.

open_analysis_questions: What are the specific performance metrics (e.g., response time, throughput, resource utilization, latency) that the Horizon Dashboard system must meet to address identified concerns?

What are the specific business needs that would necessitate integration with the CRM system, what data elements would need to be exchanged, and what integration patterns (e.g., API, messaging, batch) are suitable?
What are the current limitations of the existing database, and what criteria will be used to evaluate and select a 'better' database for future improvements?

stakeholder.business_summary: Our recent discussions highlighted significant concerns regarding the Horizon Dashboard's performance and the current user interface, which the team agrees needs a complete redesign to improve aesthetics and user experience. Addressing these issues is critical for the project's success and user satisfaction, though project timelines and budget specifics remain open questions.
key_impact: Poor performance could lead to decreased user satisfaction and hinder operational efficiency.
The current unsatisfactory user interface directly impacts user experience and the overall perception of the product, requiring immediate aesthetic improvements and a redesign.
Uncertainty around budget and timelines could delay critical improvements and impact the project's ability to meet business needs.
decisions_needing_alignment: Confirmation on the suggestion to use a better database solution for future project improvements.
Agreement on the necessity and scope of more thorough testing processes.
Confirmation on improving documentation practices for ongoing project management and future development.
Alignment on the potential future requirement to integrate with the CRM system, including when and how this would occur.
major_unresolved_questions: What are the firm project timelines and key milestones for addressing performance and UI improvements?
What are the specific budget limitations for the project, and how will they impact the scope of the necessary UI redesign and performance enhancements?
What are the precise requirements, timing, and approach for integrating with the CRM system?

review.reviewer_notes: All role outputs are consistent with the extracted decisions. Inferred decisions are correctly flagged as needing confirmation or presented as open questions across all views. No hallucinations, quality issues (vagueness, missing sections, contradictions, jargon), or injection/sensitive content were detected.
